narrative:
Reading 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 843 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
